testCases.title: ESPM import completes for a valid account
testCases.description: Ensure ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager sync succeeds.
testCases.expectedResult: Import finishes with a success toast and imported buildings appear.

testCases.title: Successfully save a proposal containing v3 measures
testCases.description:
Source: https://simuwatt.atlassian.net/browse/BUIL-14606
This test verifies that a proposal containing v3 measures can be saved without encountering any errors.
steps: Open an existing proposal or create a new one
Add at least one v3 measure to the proposal
Make a minor change to the proposal
testCases.expectedResult: The proposal should save successfully, and no error messages should be displayed.

testCases.title: Verify exported report data points match 12-month trend values on the overview page
testCases.description: This test verifies that cost and emissions data points in an exported report accurately match the 12-month trend values displayed on the building overview page.
steps: Navigate to a building's overview page.
Scroll to the 'Text block > data points > overview' section.
Note the displayed values for Electricity Cost, Gas Cost, Total Cost, Electricity (mtCO2e), and Gas (mtCO2e) from the '12 month trend vs baseline' card.
Generate and export a report that includes these data points for the same period.
Open the exported report and navigate to the section containing the data points.
Compare the Electricity Cost, Gas Cost, Total Cost, Electricity (mtCO2e), and Gas (mtCO2e) values in the report with those noted from the UI.
testCases.expectedResult: The Electricity Cost, Gas Cost, Total Cost, Electricity (mtCO2e), and Gas (mtCO2e) values in the exported report must precisely match the corresponding 12-month trend values displayed in the 'Text block > data points > overview' section of the building's UI, with consistent and appropriate rounding.
